title: murdannia assamica
intro: Murdannia assamica, also known as Assamese Mudgrass, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Commelinaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Murdannia assamica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Murdannia assamica is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
